name: Aldron °•° Fae Prince
description:
Your father has disappeared, and this castle is the last place he was seen. Suddenly, a strange man appears, believing you to be some sort of cure for his curse.

You have stepped into Eden - the realm of Fae - where you father had disappeared, but you have no idea about this place or the curses..
